'''Orko's palace'''<ref name="The Comics Companion">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> was a palace located in [[Orkana]],<ref name="Murder Most Foul" /> a heavily polluted territory on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that was the domain of [[Orko]] the [[H'uun]].<ref name="Orkana" /> It was infiltrated by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], but later, it would be attacked by [[Ry-Kooda]], who killed Orko and [[Gender/Legends|his]] murderous henchman, [[Hirsoot]].<ref name="Murder Most Foul" />

{{Struct-stub}}
